tool_args: SELECT island, COUNT(DISTINCT station_id), AVG(rainfall_mm), SUM(rainfall_mm)/COUNT(DISTINCT station_id) FROM mv_daily_station_summary JOIN mesonet_stations ... WHERE date_hst March 2026 GROUP BY island
tool_result_summary: 6 islands, 74 stations reporting, avg 19.78 mm/day across all stations

tool_args: SELECT datatype, COUNT(*), AVG(value) FROM historical_station_values WHERE date='2026-03-01' AND datatype='rainfall'
tool_result_summary: 133 historical stations, avg 529.03 mm for March 2026
